prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white widescreen photograph of a lone tattooed dark fantasy warrior-priest standing on a rugged mountain ridge, centered slightly right, facing the camera with both arms extended outward in a ritualistic pose. The figure has messy dark hair and an intentionally obscured face covered by a soft square blur, giving an anonymous editorial look. Dress him in an ornate black velvet cloak with heavy draped sleeves, metallic trim, and a dramatic shoulder mantle; the costume has exactly 5 prominent visible outfit elements: a black hooded cape, a polished metal chest plate with round studs, layered chain straps across the torso, a wide belt with circular medallions, and a dark pleated skirt or kilt. His bare chest and forearms show dense tattoos, and his hands hold thin dangling cords or straps. Place him outdoors on a steep rocky hillside with a large dark mountain slope rising on the right, a hazy valley stretching into the distance on the left, sparse grass in the foreground, and exactly 3 small soft clouds in the sky. Use high-contrast analog film photography, shallow depth of field, visible film grain, natural daylight, dramatic shadows, and a slightly low-angle heroic composition. The mood should feel mystical, pagan, and theatrical, like a fashion editorial shot in a remote wilderness. No text, no watermark, no modern buildings, no extra people.
